title: Implementation of Quantum Safe Ecosystem in India - Report of the Task Force
description: DST National Quantum Mission task force report (Feb 2026) recommending phased PQC migration for critical sectors, cryptographic inventories, crypto-agile design, and a national testing/certification framework.

title: Report on Quantum-Safe Ecosystem in India
description: DST report under the National Quantum Mission setting national targets for quantum resiliency of Critical Information Infrastructure by 2029 and enterprise-wide PQC adoption by 2033.

title: Quantum Safe Ecosystem in India (landing page)
description: DST page on the Quantum-Safe Ecosystem initiative under the National Quantum Mission, covering PQC migration pathways and certification.

title: Report on Implementation of Quantum Safe Ecosystem in India (news)
description: DST news item announcing the task force report on implementation of a quantum safe ecosystem and PQC migration.

title: The National Quantum Mission: Marching towards a safer future with quantum security
description: DST article on the National Quantum Mission including deployment of post-quantum cryptographic solutions.

title: Transitioning to Quantum Cyber Readiness (CERT-In whitepaper CIWP-2025-0002)
description: CERT-In information whitepaper (with MeitY and SISA) providing a strategic roadmap to transition India's digital ecosystem to quantum-resilient / post-quantum cryptography.

title: MeitY Launches Whitepaper to guide India's shift towards an Atmanirbhar & Quantum-Safe Cybersecurity (PIB)
description: Press Information Bureau (Government of India) release announcing MeitY's whitepaper 'Transitioning to Quantum Cyber Readiness' on post-quantum / quantum-safe cybersecurity, July 2025.

title: TEC 910018:2025 - Technical Report on Migration to Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC)
description: Telecommunication Engineering Centre technical report (TEC 910018:2025) on migration to post-quantum cryptography for the telecom sector.

title: Cybersecurity and Cyber Resilience Framework (CSCRF) for SEBI Regulated Entities (REs)
description: SEBI circular (Aug 2024) requiring regulated entities to maintain cryptographic asset inventories and prepare for post-quantum cryptography migration.

title: CSCRF circular PDF (SEBI/HO/ITD-1/ITD_CSC_EXT/P/CIR/2024/113)
description: PDF of the SEBI CSCRF circular for regulated entities, referencing post-quantum risks and PQC migration inventories.

title: Technical Clarifications to CSCRF for SEBI Regulated Entities
description: SEBI Aug 2025 technical clarifications to the CSCRF, including guidance on post-quantum cryptography cryptographic-asset inventories.

title: RBI sets up Q-SAFE expert committee on quantum technology for the financial sector
description: Reporting on RBI's May 2026 press release constituting the Q-SAFE expert committee to assess cryptographic inventory (CBOM), crypto-agility and a roadmap for quantum-safe cryptography in finance. (Official rbi.org.in URL not located.)

title: Securing the Indian Banking Sector in the Age of Quantum Computing (RBIH whitepaper)
description: Reserve Bank Innovation Hub whitepaper recommending Indian banks proactively transition to post-quantum cryptography (PQC) algorithms.

title: India Reveals National Plan for Quantum-Safe Security
description: Trade-press coverage of India's national PQC roadmap (non-institutional; for context only).

title: India's Post-Quantum Cryptography Migration Roadmap (ORF)
description: Observer Research Foundation think-tank analysis of India's PQC roadmap (non-institutional; for context only).
